default_branch.description: Specifies the default branch for the repository, typically used for version control workflows; must already exist in the repository.

description.description: Defines the repository's purpose or details, displayed in the AWS Management Console, with a maximum length of 1,000 characters.

kms_key_id.description: Specifies the ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the repository. Must be a valid KMS key ARN.

repository_name.description: Name of the CodeCommit repository to create; must be unique within the AWS account.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize, categorize, or identify the repository; must be a valid tag format.
